events.title: Cayucos Friday Farmers' Market
events.window: Every Friday, 10am to 12:30pm, Memorial Day weekend through Labor Day weekend
events.venue: Corner of D St & Ocean Ave, Cayucos Vet's Hall parking lot
events.summary: Weekly summer market with local produce, plants, flowers & seasonal goods at the Vet's Hall lot near the pier.

events.title: Brian Waterbury Memorial Rock to Pier Fun Run & Half Marathon
events.summary: 56th annual beach run: 6-mile Fun Run finishes at Cayucos Pier; Half Marathon out-and-back from Morro Rock. All ages welcome.

events.title: Cayucos Fall Antique Street Faire
events.venue: Ocean Ave between E St & Cayucos Dr, Downtown Cayucos
events.summary: 40th edition of the biannual antique faire with 90+ dealer booths, food vendors & live music along Ocean Ave. Free admission.

events.title: 35th Annual Cayucos Car Show
events.summary: Classic cars cruise downtown Cayucos with live music, beer garden & Lions BBQ. Friday check-in party at Nelson's Garage.
